INTJ.label: Architect
INTJ.description: Strategic, independent thinker who values competence and long-term planning
preferences: Prefers logical, evidence-based reasoning over emotional appeals or gut feelings
Values long-term strategic planning and dislikes short-sighted or impulsive decisions
Seeks deep mastery of subjects rather than surface-level familiarity
Prefers working independently with minimal supervision or social interruption
Appreciates direct, concise communication and dislikes small talk or social rituals
Judges ideas on merit and logic, regardless of social consensus or authority
Values autonomy and self-determination above conformity to group norms
Prefers systems, frameworks, and structured approaches to complex problems

INTP.label: Logician
INTP.description: Innovative, precise thinker who loves exploring theoretical ideas
preferences: Enjoys exploring abstract theories and hypothetical scenarios for their own sake
Values intellectual honesty and precision; dislikes vague or inconsistent reasoning
Prefers understanding the underlying principles of a system rather than memorizing rules
Tends to play devil's advocate and enjoys stress-testing ideas through debate
Prefers flexible, unstructured environments that allow for spontaneous exploration
Values competence and intellectual curiosity above social status or authority
Dislikes repetitive or routine tasks; seeks novel intellectual challenges
Approaches problems analytically, breaking them down into component parts

ENTJ.label: Commander
ENTJ.description: Bold, decisive leader who excels at organizing people and achieving goals
preferences: Prefers taking charge and organizing systems and people toward clear objectives
Values efficiency and decisive action; dislikes indecision, ambiguity, or wasted effort
Sets high standards for competence and expects others to meet them
Prefers direct, frank communication and gets frustrated with evasiveness
Enjoys strategic planning and long-term vision over day-to-day operational details
Views obstacles as challenges to overcome rather than reasons to stop
Prefers structured environments with clear hierarchies and accountability
Values continuous improvement and pushes both self and others toward growth

ENTP.label: Debater
ENTP.description: Quick-witted, curious thinker who loves intellectual sparring and new ideas
preferences: Enjoys intellectual debate and is energized by challenging established ideas
Values innovation and creativity; dislikes rigid rules or bureaucratic thinking
Prefers brainstorming possibilities over executing detailed implementation plans
Is drawn to complex, multifaceted problems that require creative lateral thinking
Enjoys playing devil's advocate even for positions they don't personally hold
Prefers variety and novelty; gets bored with repetition and routine
Values intelligence and quick thinking in others above social niceties
Tends to multitask across many projects rather than focusing on one at a time

INFJ.label: Advocate
INFJ.description: Insightful, principled idealist driven by a vision for a better world
preferences: Is motivated by a deep sense of purpose and the desire to make a positive difference
Values authenticity and meaningful connections over superficial social interactions
Prefers understanding people's motivations and deeper emotional needs
Approaches conflicts with empathy but holds firm to core values and principles
Prefers thoughtful, in-depth conversations over casual small talk
Values harmony but will speak out firmly against injustice or ethical violations
Prefers planned, organized environments with time to process internally before acting
Seeks alignment between personal values and professional or creative work

INFP.label: Mediator
INFP.description: Idealistic, empathetic dreamer guided by personal values and authenticity
preferences: Places personal values and authenticity above external expectations or social norms
Is motivated by meaning and purpose; dislikes tasks that feel pointless or exploitative
Prefers deep one-on-one connections over large social gatherings
Values creative expression as a way to explore and communicate inner emotional worlds
Approaches others with empathy and a non-judgmental, open-minded attitude
Dislikes conflict but will advocate passionately for deeply held values
Prefers flexible, unstructured environments that honor individual expression
Seeks to understand the human condition through stories, art, and personal narrative

ENFJ.label: Protagonist
ENFJ.description: Charismatic, empathetic leader who inspires and organizes people around shared goals
preferences: Is energized by helping others grow, succeed, and realize their potential
Values harmony and cooperation; actively works to resolve interpersonal conflict
Prefers inclusive decision-making processes that consider everyone's perspective
Is highly attuned to the emotional dynamics in a group or relationship
Communicates with warmth, enthusiasm, and a focus on shared values
Prefers structured plans with clear goals, especially when leading a team
Values loyalty, commitment, and long-term relationships over transactional interactions
Motivates others through positive reinforcement and genuine appreciation

ENFP.label: Campaigner
ENFP.description: Enthusiastic, imaginative free spirit who sees life as full of possibilities
preferences: Is energized by new ideas, people, and experiences; dislikes routine and repetition
Values emotional connection and authentic self-expression in all relationships
Prefers brainstorming creative possibilities over rigid planning or execution
Is highly empathetic and draws energy from meaningful conversations about life and feelings
Values freedom and spontaneity; resists rigid rules and conventional expectations
Seeks inspiration and meaning in everyday experiences and human stories
Prefers collaborative, open-ended environments that celebrate individuality
Brings enthusiasm and optimism but can struggle with following through on commitments

ISTJ.label: Logistician
ISTJ.description: Reliable, detail-oriented organizer who values duty, tradition, and order
preferences: Values reliability, consistency, and following through on commitments
Prefers well-established procedures and proven methods over unproven innovations
Approaches tasks systematically with attention to accuracy and detail
Values punctuality, organization, and meeting responsibilities without excuses
Prefers clear expectations and defined roles over ambiguous open-ended situations
Makes decisions based on past experience and verified facts rather than speculation
Values tradition, institutions, and social stability as foundations for orderly life
Prefers working in a quiet, structured environment with minimal distractions

ISFJ.label: Defender
ISFJ.description: Warm, meticulous caretaker devoted to supporting and protecting others
preferences: Finds fulfillment in caring for others and ensuring their practical needs are met
Values loyalty, dependability, and long-term commitment in relationships
Prefers familiar, stable environments over constant change or uncertainty
Pays close attention to details and remembers specific facts about people they care about
Approaches conflicts cautiously and prefers harmony over confrontation
Values tradition, family, and community as sources of meaning and identity
Prefers working behind the scenes to support others rather than seeking recognition
Makes decisions with careful consideration of how they affect the people involved

ESTJ.label: Executive
ESTJ.description: Organized, decisive administrator who upholds structure and takes charge
preferences: Values clear structure, defined rules, and consistent enforcement of standards
Prefers decisive action and dislikes prolonged deliberation or ambiguity
Takes responsibility seriously and expects others to fulfill their obligations
Values tradition and proven methods; is skeptical of untested innovations
Prefers direct, no-nonsense communication without excessive sentimentality
Is comfortable in leadership roles and naturally takes charge in disorganized situations
Values hard work, diligence, and measurable productivity as marks of good character
Prefers community involvement and upholding social institutions and norms

ESFJ.label: Consul
ESFJ.description: Caring, sociable organizer who thrives on maintaining harmony and helping others
preferences: Derives satisfaction from being helpful and ensuring others feel cared for
Values social harmony and actively works to maintain positive group dynamics
Is highly aware of social norms and expectations and generally respects them
Prefers warm, personal communication and remembers important details about others
Values loyalty, tradition, and long-term relationships above novelty or adventure
Organizes social events and community activities to bring people together
Makes decisions based on how they affect the people involved, not just logic
Seeks approval and recognition from others and is sensitive to criticism

ISTP.label: Virtuoso
ISTP.description: Observant, practical problem-solver who loves hands-on exploration and tools
preferences: Learns best through direct hands-on experience rather than abstract theory
Prefers practical, efficient solutions that work in the real world
Values personal freedom and independence; dislikes being micromanaged
Is calm under pressure and approaches crises with rational, detached analysis
Prefers action over prolonged discussion; gets to the point quickly
Enjoys taking things apart to understand how they work at a fundamental level
Prefers flexible, unscheduled time that allows for spontaneous problem-solving
Values skill and craftsmanship; takes pride in technical mastery

ISFP.label: Adventurer
ISFP.description: Gentle, artistic soul who lives in the present and delights in aesthetic beauty
preferences: Values living in the present moment and experiencing life through the senses
Expresses identity and values through personal style, art, and aesthetic choices
Prefers gentle, non-confrontational environments and dislikes harsh criticism
Is fiercely loyal to personal values but rarely imposes them on others
Enjoys hands-on creative work and physical experiences in nature
Prefers small, close-knit social circles over large group settings
Makes decisions based on personal values and emotional resonance rather than logic
Values authenticity and dislikes pretension, social performance, or inauthenticity

ESTP.label: Entrepreneur
ESTP.description: Energetic, perceptive action-taker who thrives in dynamic, fast-paced environments
preferences: Thrives in fast-paced, high-energy environments that demand immediate action
Prefers learning through direct experience rather than reading or theory
Is observant and picks up on subtle environmental and interpersonal cues quickly
Values practicality and results; dislikes overanalyzing or philosophizing
Enjoys social interactions and is naturally charming in group settings
Prefers flexibility and spontaneity; resists rigid long-term planning
Approaches problems with resourcefulness and improvisation rather than preparation
Is risk-tolerant and finds excitement in bold, competitive challenges

ESFP.label: Entertainer
ESFP.description: Spontaneous, vivacious performer who loves people and living in the moment
preferences: Is energized by social interaction and brings fun and enthusiasm to group settings
Values living in the present and embracing experiences as they come
Prefers practical, hands-on activities over abstract theory or planning
Is warm, encouraging, and naturally attuned to the emotional needs of others
Dislikes rigid structure, long-term planning, or repetitive routine
Expresses creativity through performance, fashion, food, and social events
Prefers collaborative, spontaneous environments where everyone participates
Makes decisions based on what feels right in the moment and what benefits the group
